wine_retailers.name: La Maison des Beaujolais Caviste
wine_retailers.description: The largest single-location Beaujolais wine shop in France with 600+ references at winemaker prices, covering all 12 appellations. Master Sommelier Guillaume Mithieux provides expert guidance; nationwide delivery available.
wine_retailers.speciality: All 12 Beaujolais appellations at producer prices; 600+ references
wine_retailers.tip: Direct shipping to French addresses is available; a practical way to build a cellar of Beaujolais Crus after visiting.

wine_retailers.name: Le Comptoir Beaujolais
wine_retailers.address: 24 Square du Temple de Bacchus, 69430 Beaujeu, France
wine_retailers.description: The winemakers' cooperative shop of 16 Beaujolais-Villages producers, founded in 1956 in the historic capital Beaujeu. The full arc of appellations from Beaujolais-Villages through 10 Crus and Cremant de Bourgogne is stocked at EUR 7.50-13 per bottle.
wine_retailers.speciality: Beaujolais-Villages and all 10 Crus at producer-direct pricing; gift options and delivery

verified.address_quoted: 24 Square du Temple de Bacchus, 69430 Beaujeu

wine_retailers.name: Vignerons des Pierres Dorees Caveau Boutique
wine_retailers.description: The cooperative boutique of the southern Beaujolais Pierres Dorees zone, offering the full Vignerons range including Terra Iconia, Prestige, Pépites, Grande Reserve, and Fines Bulles sparkling. Located in a classified golden-stone village.
wine_retailers.speciality: Southern Beaujolais; Beaujolais-Villages; organic and sparkling ranges from the Pierres Dorees

wine_retailers.name: Cave Cooperative de Julienas Chaintre Boutique
wine_retailers.address: Chateau du Bois de la Salle, 69840 Julienas, France
wine_retailers.description: The retail shop of 85 grower-members managing 290 hectares across nine Beaujolais appellations. The range from nine Crus, Beaujolais-Villages, and Cremant de Bourgogne is sold direct from the classified 15th-century Chateau du Bois de la Salle.
wine_retailers.speciality: Julienas, Chenas, Moulin-a-Vent, Fleurie, Brouilly; all nine Crus at cooperative pricing

verified.address_quoted: Chateau du Bois de la Salle, 69840 Julienas

wine_retailers.name: Cave du Chateau de Chenas
wine_retailers.address: 910 Route de la Bruyere, 69840 Chenas, France
wine_retailers.description: Northern Beaujolais cooperative retail cellar at the heart of the Chenas appellation, with direct sales covering Moulin-a-Vent, Chenas, Morgon, Fleurie, Julienas, Saint-Amour, Brouilly, Chiroubles, Regnié, and Beaujolais Blancs. Bottles from EUR 7.40.
wine_retailers.speciality: All 10 Crus at cooperative pricing; Moulin-a-Vent and Chenas specialists; click-and-collect available

wine_retailers.name: La Croisee des Vins
wine_retailers.description: Independent caviste with 1,000+ wines and 300+ spirits from France and beyond, with strong Beaujolais Crus representation. Guided tastings and private event hire available; the selection spans Champagne, aged rum, and whisky alongside the full Beaujolais appellation range.
wine_retailers.speciality: Multi-region French wines; Beaujolais Crus; premium spirits and Champagne alongside regional selection

wine_retailers.name: Maison du Cru Fleurie
wine_retailers.description: Village-centre retail tasting boutique stocking wines from 32 Fleurie estates. A rotating vigneron staffs the space daily, offering first-hand knowledge of their wines. All producers sell direct-to-consumer through the collective.
wine_retailers.speciality: Fleurie AOC specialist; 32 estates in one space; producer-direct at village prices

wine_retailers.name: Les Rendez-vous Bobosse Caviste
wine_retailers.description: A caviste focused on all 10 Beaujolais Crus, doubling as a wine bar and machon venue. Direct sales from a curated selection of Crus producers; charcuterie boards available alongside by-the-glass service.
wine_retailers.speciality: All 10 Beaujolais Crus; traditional machon and charcuterie pairings

wine_retailers.name: Vins Chateau Pizay Boutique
wine_retailers.description: The estate shop of Chateau de Pizay offering the full 80-hectare estate range: Morgon, Brouilly Saint-Lager, Beaujolais Blanc, Beaujolais Rose, Beaujolais Villages, and the Beaujolais Rouge. Direct sales from the oenotheque boutique.
wine_retailers.speciality: Six appellations from one 80-hectare Beaujolais estate; tour-and-buy packages available

wine_retailers.name: Distillerie du Beaujolais Boutique
wine_retailers.address: 60 Route des Saint Etienne, 69220 Charentay, France
wine_retailers.description: The boutique of the Beaujolais industrial distillery, selling oak-aged Marc du Beaujolais, Marc de Bourgogne, eau de vie de vin, Poire, and Mirabelle alongside grape seed oil. Several products carry AOP and IGP certification.
wine_retailers.speciality: Marc du Beaujolais; oak-aged eaux de vie; Beaujolais-origin spirits and liqueurs
